free_text: Structure in the photoneutron cross section of 24Mg and
The photoneutron yield curves were measured
from threshold to 30 MeV in steps of 50 keV.
The cross sections were calculated from the yield
curves smoothed following the Leiss-Penfold method.
Neutrons were detected by & 4n neutron detector
made of paraffin and BF3 counters.
Metallic magnesium samples enriched in 24Mg and 26Mg
